limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified dollar amounts or specific budget figures for AI investment are disclosed in the excerpts; spend is referenced only qualitatively as 'significant cash outflows', preventing a score above 3.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Quantified business results (e.g., % improvement, time saved at scale) are largely absent; score of 5 is supported by deployed production use cases with operational detail (patient batch manufacturing, dose selection GPT in clinical trials), which constitute concrete operational outcomes even without explicit numeric KPIs.
